description: Equal split with text content on the left and image/photo on the right. The visual and text carry equal visual weight.
usage: Use for team introductions with photos, product images with descriptions, or any visual-text pairing where both sides are equally important. Use this for stock images or Mermaid diagrams; DALP screenshots should go on screenshot-left/right browser-frame slides.
potential_usage: Works for customer case study photos, product lifestyle imagery, or any content that benefits from a strong visual alongside the narrative.

placeholder_summary.TITLE_0: Main slide title — states the key message or topic
placeholder_summary.BODY_12: Main content area — bullets, paragraphs, or structured content
placeholder_summary.CLIPART_13: Generic visual placeholder — use stock art or Mermaid diagrams, not DALP screenshots
placeholder_summary.SLIDE_NUMBER_10: Auto-generated slide number footer (do not edit)

content_suggestions.TITLE_0: Slide title (3–8 words describing Text Left + Image Right)
content_suggestions.CLIPART_13: Insert stock image or square-ish Mermaid diagram
